name: Green Beans the Kids Will Eat
recipeIngredient: 1 can diced tomatoes with green chiles, mild (10-oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter and olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Sauté the garlic and onions until the onions are transparent.
3. Add the drained cut green beans to the skillet and continue to sauté.
4. Once the beans are coated with the butter and olive oil, add the diced tomatoes.
5. Simmer for 10 minutes (or until ready to serve).
6. Just before serving, sprinkle the sautéed green beans with about a tablespoon each of breadcrumbs and parmesan cheese, to taste.
